name: Soft Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in 1/4 cup of the warm water.
2. Stir the rest of the warm water into the yeast mixture.
3. Mix flour and salt in a large bowl.
4. Add dissolved yeast to the flour mixture.
5. Add enough additional flour to make a stiff dough.
6. Knead for 10 minutes or until dough is elastic.
7. Form dough into a ball and coat with butter.
8. Cover with a damp towel and let rise for 45 minutes.
9. Pinch off a small ball of dough and form a coil, about 20 inches long and 1/2 inch in diameter.
10. Shape into pretzel form (or as desired).
11. If making pretzel shapes, wet the ends to help them stay together.
12. Dissolve baking soda in 4 cups water and bring to a boil.
13. Drop one pretzel at a time into the boiling water and let boil until it floats.
14. Remove from water and drain.
15. Place on a buttered baking sheet.
16. Sprinkle with coarse salt.
17. Bake at 475°F for 12 minutes or until browned.
